result:
Implemented `doctor --fix` as a repair path in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go). `doctor` now accepts `--fix` and `--report`; `--fix` creates stub notes for unique missing `[[note-id]]` targets, then reruns diagnostics, and `--report` lists each created stub file. I also added deterministic stub-title generation from note IDs and updated the help text plus the README description in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

I added coverage for the new workflow in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go): fixing broken links, reporting created stubs, and rejecting invalid `doctor` flag combinations.

I could not run `go test ./...` because the Go toolchain is not installed in this environment: `go: command not found`.
